caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on the topic of increasing the minimum wage (S.23). The setting is a conference room with several individuals seated around a table, engaged in discussion. A man in a suit and tie appears to be speaking, gesturing with his hands as he addresses the committee members. Various documents, water bottles, and other items are visible on the table, indicating an organized and professional environment. In the background, a woman stands holding a tablet, possibly assisting or recording the proceedings. The atmosphere suggests a serious and structured debate on the legislative matter at hand.
